title: UTSAH
content: UTSAH The University Grants Commission developed a Portal called UTSAH (Undertaking Transformative Strategies and Actions in Higher Education). This Portal is expected to effectively track and support the implementation of the National Education Policy, 2020 and its strategic initiatives across the country's Higher Educational Institutions (HEIs). This Portal also provides detailed information about UGC’s initiatives for qualitative reforms in higher education. (Website: https://utsah.ugc.ac.in/ ) The list of nominated team with the coordinators name for the UTSAH portal 1 Multidisciplinary and Holistic Education Coordinator: Dr. Hemant Sood Member:Mr. Sanjay Tewatiya 2 Digital Empowerment and Online Education Coordinator:Prof. Rakesh K. Bajaj Member: Dr. Harsh Sohal 3 Skill Development and Employability Coordinator: Prof. Ashish Kumar Member: Dr. Saurabh Rawat 4 Research, Innovation and Entrepreneurship Coordinator: Prof. Shruti Jain Member: Ekta Gandotra 5 Capacity Building of Teachers for Quality Education Coordinator: Prof. Anupriya Kaur Member: Dr. Bilal Khan 6 Governance and Autonomy Coordinator: Prof. Rakesh K Bajaj Member: Dr. Harsh Sohal 7 Accreditation and Excellence Coordinator: Prof. P. B. Barman Member: Dr. Surajit Hazra 8 Equitable and Inclusive Education Coordinator: Dr. Hemant Sood Member: Mr. Sanjay Tewatiya 9 Promotion of Indian Languages and Indian Knowledge System Coordinator: Dr. Amit Srivastava Member: Dr. Harsh Sohal 10 Internationalization of Education Coordinator: Prof. Sudhir Kumar Member: Dr. Ashok Nadda UTSAH THEMES
